summary: VeriPatch v1.3.0 stable release reached: branch policy, quality gates G1-G8 documented and enforced in CI, all gates pass locally, release consensus approved.
decisions: Agent autonomous commits forbidden on staging/main with zero exceptions
100% compilation is a hard pipeline blocker
Engineering-lead and release-manager approvals via GitHub Environments
open_items: Configure staging-promotion and production-release environments in GitHub repo settings
Manual Windows UAC smoke test before first v1.3.0 deploy
next_steps: Commit on develop/feature branch per BRANCH_POLICY
PR to staging with engineering-lead approval
Tag v1.3.0 on main after release-manager approval
